use_cases: Display real-time visitor counts on landing pages to build social proof and trust
Show animated avatar stacks representing active users on websites
Create urgency and credibility on marketing and SaaS landing pages
Visualize user engagement metrics with animated number counters
Enhance conversion rates by displaying live activity indicators
ai_summary: A live visitor counter component featuring animated avatar stacks with colored backgrounds and spring-based number animations. Uses Framer Motion for smooth transitions and displays real-time visitor counts with overlapping avatar badges. Designed for landing pages and marketing sites to demonstrate social proof and create urgency through visible user activity.
